question:
[Previous Feedback] Correct! A, C, and E all use the full datetime format with timezone offset.

Please draft the Tuesday progress sync report and save it as day02/progress_report_draft.json. Include these fields: report_date (today), generated_at (current time around 10:30), period_start (this Monday at 09:00), period_end (this Friday at 18:00), summary (a string), and milestones_status (an array).

content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 09:50 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct! A, C, and E all use the full datetime format with timezone offset.

Please draft the Tuesday progress sync report and save it as day02/progress_report_draft.json. arguments.content:
{
  "report_date": "2026-03-17",
  "generated_at": "2026-03-17T10:30:00+08:00",
  "period_start": "2026-03-16T09:00:00+08:00",
  "period_end": "2026-03-20T18:00:00+08:00",
  "summary": "Sprint 7 is underway. Key workstreams are progressing on schedule with API docs v2.3 and the auth bug fix currently in progress. Primary risks this week are tied to staging environment configuration, missing third-party OAuth documentation, and intermittent CI pipeline failures; owners have been assigned and resolution targets are set. Next focus is to unblock integration testing and stabilize CI so we can validate the auth fix and meet the remaining sprint review readiness milestones.",
  "milestones_status": [
    {
      "id": "M-1",
      "title": "API docs v2.3 complete",
      "status": "in_progress",

    },
    {
      "id": "M-2",
      "title": "Auth bug fix merged",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "target_date": "2026-03-18T18:00:00+08:00",
      "last_updated": "2026-03-17T10:00:00+08:00"
    },
    {
      "id": "M-3",
      "title": "Integration tests passing",
      "status": "pending",
      "target_date": "2026-03-23T18:00:00+08:00",
      "last_updated": "2026-03-17T10:00:00+08:00"
    },
    {
      "id": "M-4",
      "title": "Sprint review ready",
      "status": "pending",
      "target_date": "2026-03-20T17:00:00+08:00",
      "last_updated": "2026-03-17T10:00:00+08:00"
    }
  ]
}
